title: Clompanus cuneata
taxonomy: Clompanus cuneata is classified as a species of flowering plant in the family Celastraceae. It belongs to the genus Clompanus. The species is native to Australia and is often found in the eastern and southern regions. Clompanus cuneata is a shrub or small tree, typically growing up to 2-4 meters in height. Further classification may include its order and kingdom, but this information is not readily available.
